page_title: Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: PORTRAITS f
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released on 02 July 2013. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2013/803375.html The line was based on the Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo film. There are 4 regular figures in the line.
